posts.author: swheeler (Sydney Wheeler)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

My organization currently works with OHME CRM for our contact management. I would like to create a connection between OHME and Monday so that I can fill in columns with information from the CRM (contact names, email addresses, phone numbers).

Does anyone know of a no-code solution (Make? Zapier?) for sending data from an external CRM into Monday ?

Thanks,
Sydney

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @swheeler , OHME doesn’t have a connector on any no-code platform I know.

They have an API available. We, Zapier and Make certified agency, can build connectors from their APIs.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @swheeler ,

we can easily integrate various apps and services, including CRMs like Salesforce, HubSpot, and more, with Monday.com using Make

As a complimentary, here is our magic link to get 1 Month Pro plan free (10,000 operations):
